calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-08-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-08-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Thomas Hesketh, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Beneficial California, Inc., a Delaware Corporation.
Jessie Singh, Branch Manager for Plaintiff, appeared with Mr. Hesketh.
Michael Heath, Esq. appeared with defendant Helen L. Rodriguez, a/k/a Helen Rodriguez.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 4, 2008.

Written stipulation reached by the parties was adopted by and and becomes the Order of the Court.

Stipulation for Judgment and Order Thereon was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2008 Set For Trial On Sep-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
